name: React Bits
note: Use read_ui_kit locally. Do NOT fetch raw.githubusercontent.com/react-bits URLs. BlurText is under TextAnimations, not Components.

components.title: AnimatedContent
components.description: Wrapper that animates any children on scroll or mount with configurable direction, distance, duration, easing and disappear options.

components.title: AnimatedList
components.description: List items enter with staggered motion variants for polished reveals.

components.title: Antigravity
components.description: 3D antigravity particle field that repels from the cursor with smooth motion.

components.title: ASCIIText
components.description: Renders text with an animated ASCII background for a retro feel.

components.title: Aurora
components.description: Flowing aurora gradient background.

components.title: Balatro
components.description: The balatro shader, fully customizalbe and interactive.

components.title: Ballpit
components.description: Physics ball pit simulation with bouncing colorful spheres.

components.title: Beams
components.description: Crossing animated ribbons with customizable properties.

components.title: BlobCursor
components.description: Organic blob cursor that smoothly follows the pointer with inertia and elastic morphing.

components.title: BlurText
components.description: Text starts blurred then crisply resolves for a soft-focus reveal effect.

components.title: BorderGlow
components.description: Glowing mesh-gradient border that follows cursor direction and intensifies near edges.

components.title: BounceCards
components.description: Cards bounce that bounce in on mount.

components.title: BubbleMenu
components.description: Floating circular expanding menu with staggered item reveal.

components.title: CardNav
components.description: Expandable navigation bar with card panels revealing nested links.

components.title: CardSwap
components.description: Cards animate position swapping with smooth layout transitions.

components.title: Carousel
components.description: Responsive carousel with touch gestures, looping and transitions.

components.title: ChromaGrid
components.description: A responsive grid of grayscale tiles. Hovering the grid reaveals their colors.

components.title: CircularGallery
components.description: Circular orbit gallery rotating images.

components.title: CircularText
components.description: Layouts characters around a circle with optional rotation animation.

components.title: ClickSpark
components.description: Creates particle spark bursts at click position.

components.title: ColorBends
components.description: Vibrant color bends with smooth flowing animation.

components.title: Counter
components.description: Flexible animated counter supporting increments + easing.

components.title: CountUp
components.description: Animated number counter supporting formatting and decimals.

components.title: Crosshair
components.description: Custom crosshair cursor with tracking, and link hover effects.

components.title: Cubes
components.description: 3D rotating cube cluster. Supports auto-rotation or hover interaction.

components.title: CurvedLoop
components.description: Flowing looping text path along a customizable curve with drag interaction.

components.title: DarkVeil
components.description: Subtle dark background with a smooth animation and postprocessing.

components.title: DecayCard
components.description: Hover parallax effect that disintegrates the content of a card.

components.title: DecryptedText
components.description: Hacker-style decryption cycling random glyphs until resolving to real text.

components.title: Dither
components.description: Retro dithered noise shader background.

components.title: Dock
components.description: macOS style magnifying dock with proximity scaling of icons.

components.title: DomeGallery
components.description: Immersive 3D dome gallery projecting images on a hemispheric surface.

components.title: DotField
components.description: Interactive dot grid with cursor bulge, glow, sparkle, and wave effects.

components.title: DotGrid
components.description: Animated dot grid with cursor interactions.

components.title: ElasticSlider
components.description: Slider handle stretches elastically then snaps with spring physics.

components.title: ElectricBorder
components.description: Jittery electric energy border with animated arcs, glow and adjustable intensity.

components.title: EvilEye
components.description: Procedural evil eye shader with animated iris, slit pupil, and fiery outer glow.

components.title: FadeContent
components.description: Simple directional fade / slide entrance / exit wrapper with threshold-based activation.

components.title: FallingText
components.description: Characters fall with gravity + bounce creating a playful entrance.

components.title: FaultyTerminal
components.description: Terminal CRT scanline squares effect with flicker + noise.

components.title: Ferrofluid
components.description: A churning magnetic fluid traced by glowing contour lines, with a cursor magnet.

components.title: FloatingLines
components.description: 3D floating lines that react to cursor movement.

components.title: FlowingMenu
components.description: Liquid flowing active indicator glides between menu items.

components.title: FluidGlass
components.description: Glassmorphism container with animated liquid distortion refraction.

components.title: FlyingPosters
components.description: 3D posters rotate on scroll infinitely.

components.title: Folder
components.description: Interactive folder opens to reveal nested content smooth motion.

components.title: FuzzyText
components.description: Vibrating fuzzy text with controllable hover intensity.

components.title: Galaxy
components.description: Parallax realistic starfield with pointer interactions.

components.title: GhostCursor
components.description: Semi-transparent ghost cursor that smoothly follows the real cursor with a trailing effect.

components.title: GlareHover
components.description: Adds a realistic moving glare highlight on hover over any element.

components.title: GlassIcons
components.description: Icon set styled with frosted glass blur.

components.title: GlassSurface
components.description: Advanced Apple-style glass surface with real-time distortion + lighting.

components.title: GlitchText
components.description: RGB split and distortion glitch effect with jitter effects.

components.title: GooeyNav
components.description: Navigation indicator morphs with gooey blob transitions between items.

components.title: GradientBlinds
components.description: Layered gradient blinds with spotlight and noise distortion.

components.title: GradientText
components.description: Animated gradient sweep across live text with speed and color control.

components.title: GradualBlur
components.description: Progressively un-blurs content based on scroll or trigger creating a cinematic reveal.

components.title: Grainient
components.description: Grainy gradient swirls with soft wave distortion.

components.title: GridDistortion
components.description: Warped grid mesh distorts smoothly reacting to cursor.

components.title: GridMotion
components.description: Perspective moving grid lines based on cusror position.

components.title: GridScan
components.description: Animated grid room 3D scan effect and cool interactions.

components.title: Hyperspeed
components.description: Animated lines continuously moving to simulate hyperspace travel on click hold.

components.title: ImageTrail
components.description: Cursor-based image trail with several built-in variants.

components.title: InfiniteMenu
components.description: Horizontally looping menu effect that scrolls endlessly with seamless wrap.

components.title: Iridescence
components.description: Slick iridescent shader with shifting waves.

components.title: Lanyard
components.description: Swinging 3D lanyard / badge card with realistic inertial motion.

components.title: LaserFlow
components.description: Dynamic laser light that flows onto a surface, customizable effect.

components.title: LetterGlitch
components.description: Matrix style letter animation.

components.title: Lightfall
components.description: Colorful light streaks raining down a glowing tunnel with a cursor light.

components.title: Lightning
components.description: Procedural lightning bolts with branching and glow flicker.

components.title: LightPillar
components.description: Vertical pillar of light with glow effects.

components.title: LightRays
components.description: Volumetric light rays/beams with customizable direction.

components.title: LineSidebar
components.description: Static list navigation with a cursor-proximity effect that shifts and highlights nearby items.

components.title: LineWaves
components.description: Animated line wave pattern with colorful warped distortion.

components.title: LiquidChrome
components.description: Liquid metallic chrome shader with flowing reflective surface.

components.title: LiquidEther
components.description: Interactive liquid shader with flowing distortion and customizable colors.

components.title: LogoLoop
components.description: Continuously looping marquee of brand or tech logos with seamless repeat and hover pause.

components.title: MagicBento
components.description: Interactive bento grid tiles expand + animate with various options.

components.title: MagicRings
components.description: Interactive magic rings effect with customizable parameters.

components.title: Magnet
components.description: Elements magnetically ease toward the cursor then settle back with spring physics.

components.title: MagnetLines
components.description: Animated field lines bend toward the cursor.

components.title: Masonry
components.description: Responsive masonry layout with animated reflow + gaps optimization.

components.title: MetaBalls
components.description: Liquid metaball blobs that merge and separate with smooth implicit surface animation.

components.title: MetallicPaint
components.description: Liquid metallic paint shader which can be applied to SVG elements.

components.title: ModelViewer
components.description: Three.js model viewer with orbit controls and lighting presets.

components.title: Noise
components.description: Animated film grain / noise overlay adding subtle texture and motion.

components.title: Orb
components.description: Floating energy orb with customizable hover effect.

components.title: OrbitImages
components.description: SVG Path customizable orbiting images effect

components.title: Particles
components.description: Configurable particle system.

components.title: PillNav
components.description: Minimal pill nav with sliding active highlight + smooth easing.

components.title: PixelBlast
components.description: Exploding pixel particle bursts with optional liquid postprocessing.

components.title: PixelCard
components.description: Card content revealed through pixel expansion transition.

components.title: PixelSnow
components.description: Falling pixelated snow effect with customizable density and speed.

components.title: PixelTrail
components.description: Pixelated cursor trail emitting fading squares with retro digital feel.

components.title: PixelTransition
components.description: Pixel dissolve transition for content reveal on hover.

components.title: Plasma
components.description: Organic plasma gradients swirl + morph with smooth turbulence.

components.title: PlasmaWave
components.description: Raymarched plasma waves with dual-wave interference and OGL.

components.title: Prism
components.description: Rotating prism with configurable intensity, size, and colors.

components.title: PrismaticBurst
components.description: Burst of light rays with controllable color, distortion, amount.

components.title: ProfileCard
components.description: Animated profile card glare with 3D hover effect.

components.title: Radar
components.description: Radar sweep effect with concentric rings, radial spokes, and a rotating beam.

components.title: ReflectiveCard
components.description: Card with dynamic webcam reflection and glare effects that respond to cursor movement.

components.title: Ribbons
components.description: Flowing responsive ribbons/cursor trail driven by physics and pointer motion.

components.title: RippleGrid
components.description: A grid that continuously animates with a ripple effect.

components.title: RotatingText
components.description: Cycles through multiple phrases with 3D rotate / flip transitions.

components.title: ScrambledText
components.description: Detects cursor position and applies a distortion effect to text.

components.title: ScrollFloat
components.description: Text gently floats / parallax shifts on scroll.

components.title: ScrollReveal
components.description: Text gently unblurs and reveals on scroll.

components.title: ScrollStack
components.description: Overlapping card stack reveals on scroll with depth layering.

components.title: ScrollVelocity
components.description: Text marquee animatio - speed and distortion scale with user's scroll velocity.

components.title: ShapeBlur
components.description: Morphing blurred geometric shape. The effect occurs on hover.

components.title: ShapeGrid
components.description: Animated grid with shape variants (square, hexagon, circle, triangle) + direction customization.

components.title: ShinyText
components.description: Metallic sheen sweeps across text producing a reflective highlight.

components.title: Shuffle
components.description: Animated text reveal where characters shuffle before settling.

components.title: SideRays
components.description: Animated light rays emanating from the side with customizable colors and speed.

components.title: Silk
components.description: Smooth waves background with soft lighting.

components.title: SoftAurora
components.description: Soft aurora borealis shader with 3D Perlin noise and cosine gradient palettes.

components.title: SplashCursor
components.description: Liquid splash burst at cursor with curling ripples and waves.

components.title: SplitText
components.description: Splits text into characters / words for staggered entrance animation.

components.title: SpotlightCard
components.description: Dynamic spotlight follows cursor casting gradient illumination.

components.title: Stack
components.description: Layered stack with swipe animations, autoplay and smooth transitions.

components.title: StaggeredMenu
components.description: Menu with staggered item animations and smooth transitions on open/close.

components.title: StarBorder
components.description: Animated star / sparkle border orbiting content with twinkle pulses.

components.title: Stepper
components.description: Animated multi-step progress indicator with active state transitions.

components.title: StickerPeel
components.description: Sticker corner lift + peel interaction using 3D transform and shadow depth.

components.title: Strands
components.description: Glowing ribbon-like strands that ripple and weave across a transparent canvas.

components.title: TargetCursor
components.description: A cursor follow animation with 4 corners that lock onto targets.

components.title: TextCursor
components.description: Make any text element follow your cursor, leaving a trail of copies behind it.

components.title: TextPressure
components.description: Characters scale / warp interactively based on pointer pressure zone.

components.title: TextType
components.description: Typewriter effect with blinking cursor and adjustable typing cadence.

components.title: Threads
components.description: Animated pattern of lines forming a fabric-like motion.

components.title: TiltedCard
components.description: 3D perspective tilt card reacting to pointer.

components.title: TrueFocus
components.description: Applies dynamic blur / clarity based over a series of words in order.

components.title: VariableProximity
components.description: Letter styling changes continuously with pointer distance mapping.

components.title: Waves
components.description: Layered lines that form smooth wave patterns with animation.
